positive: A dynamic, abstract composition of intertwined forest elements: bioluminescent flora, crystalline ferns, and glowing mushroom clusters, forming a symmetrical, repeating pattern suitable for apparel print. The scene uses a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and soft pops of luminous teal and violet. Focus on intricate, clean line work and silhouettes to create depth and visual energy. The composition must be centrally balanced and suitable for a seamless repeat tile effect. High detail, vector art aesthetic, clean edges, gothic scientific illustration style, volumetric lighting, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, gradient, photo, realistic, bokeh, dirty, rough edges
